title: DNA Extraction with Zymo Quick-DNA™ Fungal/Bacterial Miniprep Kit
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5a36v","text":"This protocol is used to extract genomic DNA from bacterial and fungal isolates using the Quick-DNATM Fungal/Bacterial Miniprep Kit (Zymo Research). The kit enables rapid DNA extraction in as little as 15 minutes. The resulting ultra-pure DNA is suitable for PCR, next-generation sequencing (NGS), and other molecular applications.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":99,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ei8s8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2uf65","text":"This protocol includes three key modifications to the manufacturer’s instructions:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8hjag","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d58h0","text":"A sample preparation step has been added.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"727qs","text":"Guidance is provided for addressing insufficient bead beating.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ekmbq","text":"The lysis mixture is loaded onto the column once, rather than twice, to streamline the workflow.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"8lcfh","text":"For a new kit, add β-mercaptoethanol (not provided) to the Genomic Lysis Buffer to a final concentration of 0.5% (v/v), i.e., 500 µL per 100 mL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"72ce0","text":"Kit","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mjb","text":"Quick-DNA™ Fungal/Bacterial Miniprep Kit (Zymo, D6005)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1jfgh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ecd05","text":"Equipment: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9hdp7","text":"Microcentrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bahk2","text":"Vortex mixer with horizontal tube holder ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7tted","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6b7j1","text":"Supplies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"albk0","text":"Microcentrifuge tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5jd0b","text":"Inoculation loops","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6oll6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4kd3a","text":"Chemical","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"egol","text":"β-mercaptoethanol ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ai2hl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Both bacterial/fungal colonies on agar plates and broth cultures can be used for DNA extraction.

Secure the lysis tubes in a bead beater (e.g., a vortex mixer with a horizontal tube holder) and homogenize at maximum speed for 5 minutes. Note: Do not discard the tube at this stage. If DNA extraction fails due to insufficient bead beating, you may re-process the tube by extending bead beating to 20 minutes and repeating the downstream steps.

Colonies Colonies from fresh culture plates can be used directly. Plates can be stored at 2°C – 8°C for up to two weeks before extraction. Add 750 µL of BashingBead Buffer to a ZR BashingBead Lysis Tube. Use a sterile inoculation loop to transfer one or several pure colonies (depending on colony size) into the tube. Note: If colonies are difficult to pick, cut a small piece of agar containing colonies and transfer the agar into the lysis tube.
Centrifuge the lysis tubes at 10,000 × g for 1 minute.
Transfer 200 µL of the supernatant into a Zymo-Spin‱ III-F Filter in a collection tube. Centrifuge at 10,000 × g for 1 minute.
Discard the filter. To the flow-through, add 600 µL of Genomic Lysis Buffer and mix thoroughly by pipetting.
Load the entire 800 µL mixture into a Zymo-Spin‱ IICR Column in a new collection tube. Centrifuge at 10,000 × g for 1 minute.
Place the Zymo-Spin TM IICR Column into a new collection tube. Discard the old tube with the flow-through.
Add 200 µL of DNA Pre-Wash Buffer to the column. Centrifuge at 10,000 × g for 1 minute.
Add 500 µL of g-DNA Wash Buffer to the column. Centrifuge at 10,000 × g for 1 minute.
Transfer the column to a clean 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube (not provided). Add 35-100 µL of DNA Elution Buffer directly onto the column matrix. Centrifuge at 10,000 × g for 1 minute to elute the DNA.

Broth Culture Centrifuge 1 mL of culture at 6,000 × g for 10 minutes in a microcentrifuge tube. Discard the supernatant and retain the pellet. The pellet can be stored at -25°C to -15°C until DNA extraction. Resuspend the pellet in 750 µL of BashingBead Buffer and transfer the suspension to a ZR BashingBead Lysis Tube.
creator: Zhenyu Shen
